'''Kolaador''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kolaador system/Legends|Kolaador system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
This [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] landscape had a [[Crystal/Legends|crystalline]] structure, which was ideal for [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] training.

During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], Kolaador was the venue for the annual [[Kolaador Speeder Derby]].<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|exp=rothc|type=crewskill|Scavenging|High-Speed Opportunities}}</ref>

Prior to the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]], [[Ru Murleen]] trained [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilots in the [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]], showing them how to avoid the obstacles.<ref name="Rebel Assault" /> Later, Kolaador was the site of a [[Battle of Kolaador|battle]] between the Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Topps">{{Topps|set=1995 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 3|cardname=Rebel Assault}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
